metadata.description: A metacognitive co-developer marketplace - modular AI pipelines for ground-truth establishment, hypothesis generation, creative synthesis, and self-guided context engineering

plugins.description: Build/change work - development planning, coding, testing, refactoring

plugins.description: Documentation and synthesis - technical docs, scholarly writing, handoff materials
